name: health-platform
description: HealthBridge Platform — Healthcare Data Orchestration + AI Care Agents (FHIR R4, DPDP 2025)

scripts.orchestrator: cd orchestrator && pip install -q -r ../backend/requirements.txt && python run.py --all
scripts.setup: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:ocr: apt-get install -y tesseract-ocr tesseract-ocr-hin poppler-utils || brew install tesseract tesseract-lang poppler || echo 'Install Tesseract and Poppler manually'
scripts.test: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; pytest tests/ -v --ignore=tests/test_e2e.py
scripts.test:e2e: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; python tests/test_e2e.py
